transcript.text:
[A total of 9 Pork Cutlets]
Do you think she can finish it? There's no way
She can't do it
[I'm feasting today]
[Predator=Satisfied]
Hello everyone~
I'm here at Anyang's pork cutlet restaurant with 24 years of tradition
That's how old I am!
They have been here for that long
I will go try it
1 Myungga Pork Cutlet (Standard)
1 Spicy Pork Cutlet, but not too spicy
1 King Pork Cutlet
Why are you ordering so much?
Sweet Potato Pork Cutlet,
Italian Pork Cutlet,

And also Spicy Cold Noodles, please
2 people came and ordered 5 servings of food
What do I do?
Thank you
These are big
They all look very similar
The King Pork Cutlet comes with 3 pieces
King, Myungga, Spicy
Cheese and Italian
Bon appetit
Looks good
It's a very traditional pork cutlet
It comes with Spicy Rice Cake? Yes
You can't go wrong with these traditional pork cutlet styles
The sauce is tasty The style is very standard
There's sauce all over

Very delicious
Students will love it
It's very easy to eat because it's tender
It's good
This is the spicy pork cutlet
I thought the sauce would be red, but it's not
It doesn't look spicy I think I can manage it
[Nevermind]
It's spicy regardless of the color
That's spicy
I'll come back to it later
Not sure if this is the cheese or the sweet potato cheese
This one is the cheese pork cutlet
This can't go wrong
Spicy Cold Noodles Thank you
Sweet Potato Pork cutlet

Does it have both cheese and the sweet potato?
It has both cheese and sweet potato
It's good Really good
Oh right, I didn't try the King Pork Cutlet
This is the King
They probably taste the same
Yes, same thing
That's the size
Yum
[Chat: Eating it like a Pikachu Donkatsu (brand)]
For the noodles
Let's remove this
That's too long
That tastes really good
Sweet and spicy
The balance of the sweetness and the spiciness is...

Just right
They use the same kind of sauce except for this one (spicy one)
The sauce is delicious, so I don't get sick of the same taste
They come out with all types of different pork cutlets these days
But these standard and traditional pork cutlets are the best
Let's try the spicy 1 more time
It was so spicy
This is the spicy one
It got better
I asked them to make it less spicy
So it's not totally spicy
It's just about right
The sweet potato+cheese pork cutlet is the best out of here
I like the standard one though
It's savory
It's very textbook-like

The cheese got hardened because it's been sitting here
I should've eaten this one earlier
My goodness
Did she hide them somewhere? She really ate all that?
That's amazing
She's so good at eating
Where does all the food go?
I'll have to cut the spicy one into pieces
Cleanse
It's still okay
[Not okay]
I can't eat the spicy rice
That's so spicy
Thank you
[Chat: Eat some kimchi] That's going to make it worse
I'll have to scrape off the sauce

It's so much better now that I scraped off the sauce
[A celebratory gift] Thank you
It's the plum juice
Thank you
Refreshing
It's been a while, but these were very delicious, traditional pork cutlets
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com]
